name: visualize
description: Create beautiful, self-contained HTML visualizations from any content or idea. Use for slide decks, dashboards, infographics, flowcharts, timelines, cheat sheets, posters, and more.

interface.shortDescription: Turn prompts, data, and URLs into polished single-file HTML visuals.
interface.longDescription: Visualize generates polished single-file HTML outputs for decks, dashboards, infographics, timelines, comparison charts, and more using the bundled visualize skill.
defaultPrompt: Create a pitch deck for my AI startup.
Turn this CSV into a dashboard in ~/Downloads.
Make an infographic from this article URL.
